title: Crispy Turkish Tomato Stir-fry
description: A floral and crispy show-off dish featuring white vinegar and vegan-friendly elements, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons white vinegar (mild)
ingredients.notes: such as white wine or apple cider vinegar

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon sugar (optional)
ingredients.notes: to balance acidity and enhance sweetness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic, cook until soft, about 3 minutes.
Stir in cherry tomatoes, salt (if using), vinegar, lemon juice, pepper, sugar, and sesame oil. Mix well.
Cover with a lid and simmer for about 5 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes to thicken further.
Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the tomato mixture.
Return the wok to medium-high heat, tilting gently to coat all sides of the tomatoes with crumbs.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until crumbs are golden brown.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
